value.description: Metric value displayed prominently by stats-style smart_layout items.

description.description: Optional explanatory sentence accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.
description.example: This metric summarizes the improvement learners should understand from the slide.

icon_name.description: Optional Remix Icon class accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.

items.label: Faster Recall
items.description: This metric summarizes the improvement learners should understand from the slide.

items.label: Key Steps
items.description: This metric counts the steps needed to apply the concept.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Use value and label for metric items.
Only use fields accepted by the current smart_layout item mapping.
